name: PayTrek
features: multi-currency invoicing (80+ currencies including EUR, GBP, USD native)
global payment rails (SWIFT, SEPA, Faster Payments)
real-time bank feeds (Barclays, HSBC via Open Banking API)
audit trail export: PDF with digital signature
24/7 support SLA with dedicated success manager
known_limitations: Data residency: US-only (US-East and US-West regions). No UK or EU data residency available. GDPR Data Processing Agreement available but data stored on US servers — non-compliant with Meridian's UK GDPR obligations for EU client data.
EU clients with data sovereignty requirements cannot be served
Pricing increases if payment volume exceeds £500k/month
No self-serve EU data residency roadmap confirmed
notes: Feature set is excellent — resolves all VaultLedger known issues including IFRS 15 and multi-currency. However: US-only data residency is a HARD BLOCK. Meridian's EU client engagements (DACH, Benelux) require EU/UK data residency under UK GDPR Article 46. A GDPR DPA alone does not satisfy the residency requirement when data is processed and stored exclusively in the US. Verdict: STAY regardless of feature merit or ROI calculation.
